autonomy_blocker_delta.delta_reason: honest disclosure — entries that previously held fake compliance (broken module-checks / unbounded wave) now have NO command, so autonomy correctly flags them

autonomy_warning_delta.delta_reason: new warnings from missing-wave-follow-up on 47 entries with no bounded surface, and missing-test-file / module-check-no-test-ref on entries whose broken commands were removed

req_1_module_coverage_generator.summary: Rewrote build_coverage_map.py to consume current canonical tags (module-checks, wave-follow-up, phase-follow-up, required-trace-assertions, test-files) and final-* reports; removed legacy wave-checks/phase-checks consumption and baseline-autonomy dependency.

req_2_remove_dead_module_checks.summary: Removed 17 module-checks that referenced missing test files or non-executable targets (.ps1, .yml, .spec, .ipynb, src/ files). Kept STATUS on already-blocked entries; downgraded 6 prior 'passed' entries to blocked where no executable evidence remains. Added specific blocked-reason per entry.

req_3_bounded_wave_follow_up.summary: Replaced all 110 unbounded `python -m pytest tests -q` wave-follow-up commands. 97 entries now use a bounded surface derived from declared test-files or layer mapping; 47 entries with no honest bounded surface have empty wave-follow-up and are blocked/planned (flagged by autonomy profile as missing-wave-follow-up).

req_4_concrete_observable_evidence.summary: Replaced generic 'contract honored' / 'fulfills its contract' assertions with concrete observable evidence in 53 passed entries. Evidence now references specific assert statements, log markers, JSON fields, mock calls, or stable artifacts. 4 entries whose only declared test does not actually assert the contract were downgraded to blocked; 2 architecture-only entries (V-M-REF-LEGACY, V-M-REF-CANONICAL-ROUTE) were given concrete test-files declarations linking their architecture-test evidence.

req_5_total_vm_entries.summary: final-summary.json now computes total_vm_entries dynamically from verification-plan.xml (144, integer). Removed the prior `true` placeholder. Added build_final_summary.py as the deterministic generator.

req_6_raw_pytest_output.summary: Created test-runs/ with targeted/wave/phase .txt + .json. Targeted=83 passed, Wave=238 passed, Phase=1165 passed + 7 pre-existing F-0103 codec_context failures (basis documented). Full raw stdout+stderr preserved.
